---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: Publications
date-format: "MMM YYYY"
page-layout: full
categories: false
toc: true
listing:
  - id: featured
    contents: "featured/*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, title, publication, categories, image]

  - id: journal
    contents: "journal/*/*.qmd"
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    type: default
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, title, publication, categories]

  - id: book-chapter
    contents: "book-chapter/*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, title, publication, categories]

  - id: conference
    contents: "conference/*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, title, publication, categories]

  - id: magazine
    contents: "magazine/*/*.qmd"
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    type: default
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, title, publication, categories]

  - id: preprint
    contents: "preprint/*/*.qmd"
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    type: default
    date-format: "YYYY"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    fields: [date, author, publication, title, categories]

  - id: thesis
    contents: "thesis/*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    date-format: "YYYY"
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [date, Type, title, categories]

---


## Featured papers

:::{#featured}
:::

## Journal papers
:::{#journal}
:::

## Scientific Magazine
:::{#magazine}
:::

## Book chapters
:::{#book-chapter}
:::

## Conference papers
:::{#conference}
:::

## Preprint
:::{#preprint}
:::

## Thesis
:::{#thesis}
:::
